---
output: html_fragment
---

# Details

```{r, results = "asis"}
for (x in files) {
  report_file <- paste0(".", str_sub(dirname(x), str_length(root_directory) + 1), "/report.html")
  cat(sprintf(" * [%s](%s){target=\"_blank\"}%s", get_file_relative_path(x), report_file, compute_error_and_warning_summary(files_error_count[[x]], files_warning_count[[x]])), sep = "\n")
}
```
